programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los diez cocineros restantes deben hacer tapas con las sobras. Un error de un Chef hace que ambos equipos tengan un casi fracaso.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay desafía los paladares de los equipos en una prueba de sabor a ciegas. En un servicio de cena abarrotado, la ansiedad es mayor de lo normal cuando pasan las celebridades Eric McCormack y Robert Patrick.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay separa a los equipos. Ahora los seis Chefs restantes están solos, cada uno preparando un plato con catorce ingredientes simples.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Akon
programme.desc: Music mogul and actor Akon reflects on his friendship with Michael Jackson, his work to bring electricity to Africa, and why he thinks monogamy is misguided. Plus, how Akon made Lady Gaga a superstar.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Willie Nelson
programme.desc: Country music megastar Willie Nelson invites Larry aboard his tour bus for an open conversation about life as an octogenarian, his iconic career, the legalization of marijuana, and the 2016 presidential race.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Trey Songz
programme.desc: With the release of his sixth album, Trey Songz joins Larry for a conversation about the man he credits for his music education, what his mom sacrificed for his success, and the problems with being a sex symbol.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Linda Perry
programme.desc: It’s a no holds barred discussion with Linda Perry. The producer--known for her work with Alicia Keys and Celine Dion--blasts American Idol, skewers record labels, and comes clean about her falling out with P!nk.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Weird Al Yankovic
programme.desc: With his newest album Mandatory Fun atop the Billboard charts, famed musical parodist Weird Al Yankovic joins Larry to analyze his recipe for long-standing success and discuss a potential Broadway debut. Plus, Weird Al on life in the Yankovic household.

programme.title: Larry King Now: DJ Khaled
programme.desc: Anthem king DJ Khaled joins the king of talk for an illuminating conversation about hip hop’s mounting influence, Jay Z’s genius, and the mistake young rappers make. Plus, the Palestinian producer on the chance for peace in the Middle East.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Olivia Newton-John amassed three Grammys and eight American Music Awards.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Melissa Etheridge
programme.desc: Music icon Melissa Etheridge speaks about the "panic" in her industry, Obama's job performance, legalizing marijuana and her new self-released album.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Annie Lennox
programme.desc: The great Annie Lennox sits down with Larry to discuss her new album 'Nostalgia', if she will ever write original music again and why she prefers working in a studio than on a stage.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Flea
programme.desc: The Red Hot Chili Peppers' Flea sits down with Larry to talk about his new film 'Low Down' and why it's so near to his heart. Plus, they chat RHCP and Flea's upcoming memoir.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Will.i.am
programme.desc: Black Eyed Peas' co-creator will.i.am talks with Larry King about his exciting new smart watch venture, what he thinks about Taylor Swift, and why he's "disappointed" in President Obama.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Big Sean
programme.desc: From New York City, rapper Big Sean joins Larry King for a well-rounded discussion about his new album Dark Sky Paradise, learning from boss and mentor Kanye West, and recording with girlfriend Ariana Grande.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Ludacris
programme.desc: Chris 'Ludacris' Bridges sits down with Larry King to talk about 'Furious 7,' his new album 'Ludaversal,' and his early days working the graveyard shift as a radio DJ.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Boy George
programme.desc: Boy George gives Larry King details on Culture Club's North American reunion tour and what to expect from the group's new album 'Tribes.’ Plus, the British singer opens up about his 7 years of sobriety and Indiana's controversial 'religious freedom' law.

programme.title: Larry King Now: David Guetta
programme.desc: Superstar David Guetta sits down with Larry King for a rare, in-depth interview and talks about Coachella, Nicki Minaj, running into Beyonce backstage. He also reveals his dream to collaborate with Larry, and more.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/20/82: With the championship on the line, Bruce Sutter comes into the game in the 8th inning to blank the Brewers. The Cardinals captured their ninth World Series win in a dramatic Game 7 win at Busch Stadium.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/10/1982 - Cecil Cooper plates a pair of runs on a go-ahead single in the bottom 7th inning and the Brewers hold on to secure a 4-3 win over the Angels, punching their ticket to the 1982 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/84: Kirk Gibson clinched the Tigers' 1984 World Series win with a three-run homer off Goose Gossage. With the win, Sparky Anderson becomes the first manager ever to win a championship in both the American and National Leagues.

programme.title: Cathedrals of the Game

programme.title: Baseball Seasons

programme.title: MLB 25: Greatest Postseason Home Runs

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Karla ha encontrado perfiles falsos en la red, utilizando sus fotografías, los ha reportado; algunos han desaparecido y en otros aparece bloqueada. Su mayor preocupación es: ¿qué pueden estar haciendo con esos perfiles falsos? Y, ¿quién está detrás?

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.desc: Fredrik invites Ryan to join him in listing a Chelsea penthouse; Ryan courts a Russian businessman with a penchant for luxury; in spite of a disastrous open house; Luis receives an offer on his Harlem townhouse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis' search for a missing broker comes to an unexpected end and has a profound effect on him; developers hold Fredrik's feet to the flames; the time has come to sell a penthouse and settle a bet between Ryan and Olivia.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A re-energized Luis reaches out to old friends in an effort to close a deal that has eluded him in the past; Fredrik faces competition while trying to win a project; fiancée Emilia has news that catches Ryan off guard.

programme.desc: Fredrik takes buyers on a Hudson River cruise to interest them in his new West Side development; Luis and a developer embark on a plan to create a massive unit overlooking Central Park, but one of Ryan's clients may stop them dead in their tracks.

programme.desc: Luis tries to lure Ryan back to the negotiating table after the two reach a stalemate over the Central Park South unit; Ryan must salvage a deal that falls through after the buyer is arrested; Fredrik will stop at nothing to impress a client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Mai (cq) Britt is a dangerous obstacle when the IMF sets out to learn the number of her husband's Swiss hank account by convincing him World War III has started on Paramount Television Is "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To free an imprisoned priest whose life is at stake, Jim Phelps poses as a missionary, Paris becomes a Chinese general and Barney builds a helicopter on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.desc: Lee Meriwether and Malachi Throne are guest stars in an IMF plot involving doubles and double-dealing, with Paris playing five different roles and Jim Phelps turning magician on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Musical comedy star Sally Ann Howes plays a dramatic role as a guest member of the IMF when it sets out to foil a plot to ruin a friendly country with counterfeit money on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Anne Francis joins the IMF when it sets out to prevent destruction of a secret formula vital to America's missile defense system on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To locate a hoard of stolen money, the IMF takes the one man who knows its hiding place (guest star Stephen McNally) on a bizarre submarine voyage on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF turns itself into a surgical team to operate on a tyrannical ruler who has imprisoned the rightful king, his twin brother, on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest stars Noel Harrison and Diane Baker are drawn into a daring IMF charade that uses a trained falcon to help in a crown jewel theft in the first of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney is blinded in an accident, a bride-to-be is buried alive and Paris poses as a man he is unaware is marked for death in the second of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.desc: A trained falcon is summoned in a last-ditch rescue attempt when Jim Phelps finds his IMF endangered by a traitor's assassination plot in the last of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To head off a threatened atomic blast, Jim Phelps gains entry to a top secret nuclear plant by posing as a temperamental artist with guest star Barbara Luna as his model on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: As a doctor with a startling new treatment for amnesia, Jim Phelps forces Paris to relive another man's past when the IMF pushes a search for stolen nuclear material on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A dog that collects rare stamps -- on command from the IMF -- figures in a perilous journey to the stronghold of a narcotics kingpin (guest star Fernando Lamas) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make adhesive bandages. Prince Tuesday is looking for someone to play with but all of his friends are busy. At the suggestion of King Friday, he pretends that his rag doll has come to life.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of wolves "singing," and wolf expert Kent Weber stops by with two wolves and explains that wolves are shy, not big and bad like in the fairy tales, and how they live together in families.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folksinger Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers with her ukulele and shares songs her father enjoyed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Yo-Yo Ma describes how he misses his family when he is gone and plays Bach's Sarabande on his cello. Sitting at the piano, Yo-Yo's son Nicholas plays the Skater's Waltz as a duet with his father.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays with different-sized cardboard tubes. Lady Aberlin is observing how neighbors react to the laughter box. Dr. Maggie Kimmel tells the story of “Button Broth.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of how people make toothbrushes. Lady Aberlin observes the neighbors' reactions after she can turn herself into a tiger. Princess Zelda arrives in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the request of a television neighbor, Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it to travel. Prince Tuesday does not understand why he is not big like Neighbor Aber and King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown. Robert Troll is the only one who can communicate with the “big thing.” He learns that it wants a blanket; the blanket causes it to sprout a stem and leaves.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience. Purple Panda experiments with a powder that causes flowers to grow. Prince Tuesday wishes the powder to make him grow. Mister Rogers goes to see the Harlem Spiritual Ensemble practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Harriett Cow shares the plans for a play. Lady Aberlin is greeted by a ballet dancer who dances her around the Neighborhood. The dancer inspires Ana Platypus to be a ballerina in the school play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains why he changes into a sweater and sneakers, and shows how people make sweaters and sneakers. Miss Paulificate brings Prince Tuesday's ragdoll to life by dancing with him. The neighbors decide their roles in a play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday suggests that the Neighborhood of Make-Believe be turned upside down to see if the missing crown might fall out. Trolley finds the spare crown! Mister Rogers visits the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart is dressed as Mr. McFeely and delivers a film about how people make sweaters. The children put on a play about a princess, a raccoon and a giant king. Prince Tuesday admits he had something to do with the missing crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow paint a portrait of Mr. McFeely. Robert Troll paints a portrait of King Friday who asks Lady Aberlin to have everyone copy it for themselves. Lady Aberlin explains that art comes from within each person.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Jeff and Jonny can't decide which supertruck is best, or even what the definition of supertruck is; they debate whether it's about how it looks, sounds or drives, horsepower/torque, whether it can be electric, and whether it can even do truck things.

programme.title: Head 2 Head Drag Race
programme.desc: No EV maker has yet cracked the market for hot hatches; they're small, nimble, fun - all things EVs aren't; the guys turn to gasoline to figure out the best hot hatch on the market today: the Toyota GR Corolla or the Honda Civic Type R.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: Rule benders and sneaky geniuses: these are stories of creative risk takers who know that sometimes you have to break the rules to be the hero.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: There are a million ways to modify a car, but few like these stories. From a manufacturer creating a narrow-use case spec, to one guy making a complete unicorn in his garage, we celebrate some forgotten oddballs of the mod world.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve takes a look at a '62 Gran Turismo Hawk with Studebaker's first-ever four-speed manual transmission, a '53 Starliner and a '58 President Starlight Hardtop.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve Magnante explores Chevy big-block and small-block V8 muscle cars; an ultra-rare 1968 Impala SS 427 and a 1967 Chevelle SS 396, both true four-speeds; he also unearths a 1980 Camaro Z28 with factory T-top and an electric air induction hood.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Work continues on the Volkswagen delivery bus, as Shorty gets down in the paint booth on this giant beast; it's time to get this bus across the finish line with a new motor, new suspension, new stance and brand new wheels and tires.

programme.title: Runs Good
programme.desc: Dan, Shea and Aaron buy a fox-body Mustang drag project that was halfway through a turbocharged LS heart transplant; with their eyes set on 700+ horsepower, they attempt to finish it within five days for a local "run-what-ya-brung" event.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: Hong Kong police inspector Lin Dong learns that a biochemical invention has been surgically implanted into his missing daughter. With help from a hacker, Lin tries to connect the dots between the device, a sinister army and a strange phenomenon.

programme.title: Dinoshark
programme.desc: A prehistoric shark unfreezes from an Arctic glacier and finds a feeding ground full of tourists and locals near Puerto Vallarta, Mexico.

programme.title: Sharktopus
programme.desc: Genetically engineered, a monster that is half-shark and half-octopus goes on a killing spree.

programme.title: Dinocroc vs. Supergator
programme.desc: A biotech company creates two gigantic reptiles in a secret island laboratory. When the massive creatures escape, an undercover investigator, a Fish and Game officer and a swamp hunter team up to track down and kill the beasts.

programme.title: Drive Angry
programme.desc: A brutal felon escapes from hell and with police and a satanic henchman on his trail, sets out to avenge his daughter's murder and save his grandchild from bloodthirsty cultists.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: Faced with a critical blood shortage, a vampire hematologist (Ethan Hawke) joins forces with humans (Willem Dafoe, Claudia Karvan) to perfect a cure for his problem.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A lawman (Timothy Olyphant) and his wife (Radha Mitchell) and two companions fight to make it out of town alive after an unknown toxin turns ordinary citizens into bloodthirsty lunatics.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: A man (James Purefoy) must renounce his newly taken vows of peace to rescue a young woman (Rachel Hurd-Wood) from an evil sorcerer (Jason Flemyng).

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Bad Ass 2: Bad Asses
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with grumpy old agoraphobic Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to kick ass and clean up the streets of L.A.

programme.title: The Lazarus Effect
programme.desc: A group of medical researchers discover a way to bring dead patients back to life.

programme.title: American Animals
programme.desc: The unbelievable but true story of four young men who brazenly attempt to execute one of the most audacious art heists in U.S. history.

programme.title: Wicked City
programme.desc: A secret police force known as the Black Guard protects the boundary between the human world and the demon world.

programme.title: Tucker & Dale Vs. Evil
programme.desc: Two best friends are mistaken for murderous hillbillies by a group of college kids.

programme.title: Flying Swords Of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: A Ming Dynasty freedom fighter (Jet Li), a female warrior (Zhou Xun) and a corrupt eunuch (Kun Chen) are among those who converge on a remote desert hostel that sits atop a city of treasures.

programme.title: Secretos de los museos: Túnez
programme.desc: Dentro del Museo Bardo de Túnez.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor llega con un biciclo antiguo que pone a Rick a rodar: ¿decidirá que este trato vale la pena o le dará la vuelta? A Chum le toca el lado filoso del trato en el momento en que le vende una katana japonesa a Dana White, el presidente de la UFC.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: Efecto mariposa
programme.desc: En Mayencia año 1450, Johannes Gutenberg ha estado trabajando en la creación de una imprenta durante más de 2 años.

programme.title: Efecto mariposa
programme.desc: Champollion logra descifrar la piedra de Rosetta y resuelve el misterio de los jeroglíficos.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Las desapariciones no resueltas de barcos, aviones e incluso trenes han intrigado a científicos y aventureros durante décadas.

programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau explores ecosistemas con agua dulce y salada.

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción
programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: línea roja, dos hermanas, eclipse, el refrigerador, la reunión.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Entre los psíquicos del mundo que afirman poseer habilidades extrasensoriales, los hay quienes dicen que pueden retroceder en el tiempo y ser testigos de acontecimientos del pasado que se desarrollan ante ellos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: Durante años, la gente ha afirmado haber tenido contacto directo y personal con alienígenas. En este episodio de nuestra serie, el equipo rastrea a varias personas que afirman haber tenido tal contacto.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: El 16 de abril de 2008, la ciudad de Kokomo, Indiana, fue sacudida por una gran explosión que perforó muchos oídos. Las casas se agitaron, miles de ciudadanos llamaron al 911 y la policía, los bomberos y Seguridad Nacional se presentaron para investigar.

programme.title: Archivos de ovni
programme.desc: Según los ufólogos, los grises (seres de otro mundo) secuestran a los humanos, les implantan dispositivos y realizan experimentos reproductivos. Son los extraterrestres más "familiares", cuyas imágenes vemos en todos los medios.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Ryan se prepara para luchar contra el demonio burlón que lo ha estado siguiendo. Reúne a sus mejores investigadores: un sacerdote, un psíquico y una pareja de demonólogos mientras se enfrenta a su caso más desgarrador hasta ahora.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Estado paranormal investiga a una adolescente que es perseguida por nieblas negras y muestra signos de posible influencia demoníaca. Ryan se pregunta si es fruto de una posesión o solo de una depresión.

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción
programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: buen viaje, el misterioso comerciante en el modelo T, la primicia, ángel abordo, buenos días.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Aprende las astutas tácticas que los animales utilizan para establecer jerarquías, asegurar recursos, ganar territorio y seducir a sus parejas.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Las montañas de Varunga son la personificación de las fantasías occidentales sobre el África profunda y oscura, donde habitan algunos de los animales más emblemáticos del mundo.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Mientras la mayoría considera a los grandes gatos o los grandes colmillos como los verdaderos íconos salvajes de África, pocos aprecian a las criaturas más pequeñas que dominan la pradera - los antílopes.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Hong Kong es una ciudad de ambición. Los rayos láser se disparan hacia el cielo, acentuando los ángulos de los rascacielos. Sobre la bahía, los botes chatarreros reflejan destellos de color, mientras que la luz brilla.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: La única ciudad que se sienta a horcajadas sobre dos continentes, Estambul, una vez Bizancio y una vez Constantinopla, es la capital económica y cultural de Turquía. Disfruta de esta mirada privilegiada al interior de la ciudad de las 1.001 noches.

programme.desc: El pequeño Timmy Turner se mete en un problema tras hacer su deseo un millón. El Consejo de Hadas decide que debe ser juzgado por ser el peor ahijado de la historia.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El Consejo de Hadas pone a Timmy en un juicio después de que él pide su millonésimo deseo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Un deseo previo de Timmy por el Planeta de los Padres regresa para embrujarlo cuando los Padres llegan para robarle a su madre.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Los enemigos de Timmy forman una liga a la que llaman los P.E.R.D.E.D.O.R.E.S. con el fin de aniquilarlo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Los padres de Timmy descubren que él tiene padrinos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy adopta un travieso perro hada.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que el Sr. Dinkleberg tome el lugar de su padre como el líder de los Squirrely Scouts; Cosmo pierde la memoria y se cree un genio que pertenece al papá de Timmy.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker busca una nueva fuente de la magia desde la casa de Timmy; Timmy desea ser más inteligente que los demás.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Poof se comporta mal a dos años de edad; Timmy desea el mejor teléfono del mundo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que los animales del parque puedan limpiar ellos mismos; Timmy ayuda a su madre a hacer un vídeo viral.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Foop se convierte en el padrino antihada de Vicky y el par aterroriza a Timmy y a los niños del pueblo de Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Foop y Poof deben cuidar un huevo para un proyecto escolar; el padre de Timmy se convierte en un presentador de noticias cuando Chet Ubetcha deja su trabajo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy debe sacar el polvo mágico de su hogar; Timmy desea ser "emo" y dejar de preocuparse por todo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El papá de Timmy está deprimido porque todo el mundo piensa que él es aburrido, por lo que Timmy desea que su vida sea como una película de acción. Timmy y sus padres son invitados a un club de campo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: El padre de Timmy se niega vender a Sparky a su jefe y él le hace insoportable la vida en el trabajo; Timmy y Sparky arman un plan; Timmy desea que sus antepasados hubiesen elegido carreras diferentes.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy, su padre y las hadas quedan atrapadas en un juego de mesa creado por Cosmo; Timmy desea que Sparky tenga una oportunidad de ser heroico.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que Sparky sea humano; Timmy desea que el Sr. Crocker desaparezca y él se vuelve invisible.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de hacer un trato con Papá, Crocker se vuelve el mejor amigo de Dinkleberg. Timmy desea 5000 Timmys para el Planeta de los Papás.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker intenta provocar a Sparky con una palabra secreta; Catman confunde a Sparky con su archienemigo, Dogman.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Papá inicia un programa de vigilancia en el barrio; Timmy intenta ganar un concurso por desear tener la familia perfecta.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.desc: Tony visits the Interzone, where artists escaped from Western prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Libya pulses with hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony searches the indigenous Andes for rare variety of wild cocoa.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony visits Congo, once an industrial power, now crumbling into chaos.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The host and crew make their first trip to Israel, the West Bank and Gaza.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores Andalucia during Semana Santa, the Holy Week before Easter.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores New Mexico's mash-up of cultures by sampling its food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores Copenhagen, the economic and cultural center of Denmark.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Sicilian way of life puts a premium on savoring family, life and food.

programme.desc: Tony travels to South Africa and discovers Johannesburg's culture and food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Tokyo in search of the city's dark, extreme underside.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer refuses to let her ex-boyfriend, Marcus, go. She says she'll get him back no matter what it takes. Next Eddie left Glinda and their two-year-old son 16 years ago. Today Glinda tells Eddie that she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whilst in jail, Scooter asked his dad, Richard, if his wife Keri and their child could move in with him, but he didn't expect Keri and Richard to fall in love!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: First, Denise caught her boyfriend having sex with her mom! Next, Luana suspects that her friend is sleeping with her boyfriend, Leroy. Then, Josh is not too happy when he finds out how his girlfriend affords all the football equipment for her son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Megan has been living with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. He doesn't allow her to go to school, get a job, eat when she wants, or even leave the house without his permission. Will Megan listen to her aunt and let Steve help her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Seth exploits women for money and pleasure, causing Christie immense suffering. She wants to break free from his abuse and low self-esteem. With Steve's assistance, she seeks the strength and motivation to leave this toxic relationship behind.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surfaced! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Devil Dad
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can we redeem himself?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miracle believes that her husband, Will, is cheating on her. Then, Michael says his girlfriend, Taylor, has a scandalous way of paying the bills!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rachel wants to know whether her boyfriend is too good to be true. Letisse says her cab-driving boyfriend drove another woman around town for 10 hours.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Michael learns that his brother had an affair with his fiancee and may be the father of her son. Sarah is suspicious of her daughter's much-older boyfriend.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Teneal y Richard cuentan historias diferentes, cada uno alegando que el otro no es apto para ser padre. La verdad se limitará a una prueba con el detector de mentiras, y los resultados serán impactantes.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Hoy Danny por fin está listo para enfrentarse al hombre ausente de su vida y responder a las preguntas de su vida. Steven da varias excusas para no ver a su hijo, pero ¿es posible redimirse?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Cuando la gente normal necesita ayuda, Steve Wilkos está listo para responder a la llamada. Mira cómo Steve ayuda a la gente normal a defenderse y a luchar por sus creencias para promover la justicia para todos.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tres años más tarde, Elizabeth todavía tiene muchas dudas sobre las intenciones de Manny con su familia y su marido Rodney está en medio. ¿Manny es inocente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he's always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn't want Earnie's ex Tenyia to live with them just because she's the mother of his child.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Joyia está desesperada por evitar que su amiga Stephanie vuelva con su problemático ex Scott. ¡Pero ella todavía lo ama! ¿Tendrá la voluntad de dejarlo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jack está preocupado por sus nietos porque su nuera Carol ha sido negligente y tiene mal genio. Después, Kendra explica por qué de repente dio el bebé de Corey en adopción.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La adolescente Megan vive con su antiguo novio controlador Rick. Megan no puede ir a la escuela, buscar trabajo, ni comer sin su permiso. ¿Pueden su tía y Steve lograr hacerla entender?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Rosaura conversan sobre la pérdida de su hija. Adriana informa que ve muy mal a Imanol. Luis Mario trata de convencer a Rosaura de que no trabaje con Silvano. Ella no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Maribella así como Silvano y Rosaura se encuentran en el mismo restaurante. Teobaldo le pregunta a su abuela porque le dijo a Luis Mario que la niña se llamaba Angélica.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Guillermo está decepcionado porque Jimena se fue con Rodrigo a ver a Imanol. Luisana lo calma y le dice que tiene que darle tiempo. Luis Mario le cuenta a Eduarda la crisis que sufrió Maribella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le dice a Luis Mario que Maribella si puede ver y que lo está engañando. Luis Mario no le cree. Imanol vuelve a pedirle disculpas a Adriana. Ella las acepta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario contesta el teléfono pero nadie habla. Sonia le cuelga el teléfono a Fidelia y le pregunta con quien estaba hablando. Rodrigo lleva a Karina a su casa y queda en recogerla al día siguiente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Maribella y Sinaí preparan todo para que cuando Rosaura traiga el café se le caiga encima a Maribella, para echarle la culpa. La doctora le informa a Karina que deben hacerle los exámenes nuevamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldo piensa cumplir lo que le prometió a Mairita pero su mamá lo descubre. Maribella quiere que Luis Mario se acueste con ella. Pero el no lo acepta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldo le confiesa a Rosaura que Angeliquita no es hija de su mamá. Gabriel le propone a Minerva que lo ayude a criar a su hijo. Teobaldo le vuelve a decir a Rosaura que no es verdad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda llama a Rosaura, diciéndole que su hija está muerta. Karina le dice a Rosaura que no les haga caso. Eduarda y Maribella se ríen por la broma que le gastaron a Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La doctora le informa a Karina que está gravemente enferma debido a su sangre. Mercedes llega cuando Silvano está besando a Rosaura y se mete reclamándole a Silvano que deje tranquila a Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Karina, desesperada, se toma una cantidad de pastillas para quitarse la vida. Silvano visita a Teobaldo. Él le va a contar lo de la niña pero se aparece Sonia y se calla por miedo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Maribella entran a la habitación de Rosaura para ponerle una sorpresa. María Julia le pide perdón a Iván por haber sido una mala madre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le da ánimos a Karina y le dice que lea la carta de Maximiliano. Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel lo que le pasó con Silvano y Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se cae del caballo y Silvano se acerca a él. Panchita le cuenta a Samuel todo lo que pasó, incluído lo que hizo Bruno dándole un caballo enfermo a Luis Mario.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats and company flee the crumbling laboratory, Caesar's desperate act of vengeance thwarts Joker's plan to forever silence his enemies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: House of Lies

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny and a college professor are kidnapped and held as hostages, to be killed unless two members of a radical group are released from jail. McGarrett, backed by the Governor, refuses to comply with the ransom demands of the kidnappers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A geothermal dynamics genius, plagued by personal financial problems and pressured by a loan shark, plots an extortion scheme that would trigger a man-made volcanic eruption, wiping out the entire city of Hilo.

programme.title: UFO

programme.title: La leyenda del gato demoniaco

programme.title: Un gallo con muchos huevos
programme.desc: Cuando su hogar se ve amenazado por un malvado granjero, un pequeño gallo viene al rescate. En esta excelente película animada de larga duración, la cual garantiza hacer reír a toda la familia.

programme.title: Edhel
programme.desc: Edhel tiene una malformación en las orejas que parecen las de un elfo. Afronta su malestar evitando relacionarse con la gente. El encuentro con un extraño conserje de la escuela convence a la niña de pertenecer a la noble línea de los Elfos.

programme.title: Yo, el halcón

programme.title: El monje

programme.title: El reino prohibido

programme.title: Bienvenidos al ayer

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: In the 19th film of the franchise, James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) is once again pitted against Valentin Zukovsky (Robbie Coltrane), the Russian mobster from Goldeneye. Judi Dench returns as M and Desmond Llewelyn returns as Q.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: James Bond's newest mission begins with a spectacular high-speed hovercraft chase through a minefield in the demilitarized zone separating North and South Korea - and the action doesn't let up until the credits roll.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Based on Ian Fleming's first 007 novel, James Bond (Daniel Craig) must thwart a dangerous Russian spy who is funding global terrorists from winning a poker game worth millions. The 21st film in the most successful film series in cinematic history.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) debe evitar que un peligroso espía ruso gane un juego de póker que vale millones y financia a terroristas globales.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: When sadistic thugs attack John Wick (Keanu Reeves) – a brilliantly lethal ex-assassin - he hunts them down with the skill and ruthlessness that made him an underworld legend.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Kangaroo
programme.desc: Raising kangaroo babies is fraught with challenges: predators, climatic extremes and very lively joeys mean that kangaroo moms face a daily struggle to keep their offspring alive.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Aqaba

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: The master weapons of the animal world when wielded precisely, teeth and claws are the best instruments for hunting, defense and combat in the animal world.

programme.title: Birth of Speed
programme.desc: Two mature and experienced Cheetahs are both raising cubs. The only difference is their age. ‘The Birth of Speed’ follows them on their challenge of raising cubs in this unexpected landscape.

programme.title: Gods in Shackles
programme.desc: On the dark side of India's festivals, see how elephants are mistreated. Hear an impassioned call to alleviate the suffering of these gentle giants.

programme.title: Secrets of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The contours of the Mediterranean have changed during the course of its history.

programme.title: Surviving the Serengeti
programme.desc: Surviving the Serengeti is a tale of courage and instinct, of hope and desperation—showing that during the long dry season, carnivores have little to hunt but manage to survive and raise their young.

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: Visit a baby chimp at Sydney's Toronga Zoo; an Indian village that has adopted an abandoned sloth bear cub, and see a couple of twin chimpanzees.

programme.title: Lionman: African Safari
programme.desc: Craig heads to England where he meets a man who's lived with wolves. Then he meets a friend in Ireland who has an injured tiger in his back yard and has asked for help.

programme.title: Swimming with Legends
programme.desc: The largest creatures on Earth live underwater. Their sheer size has always triggered our imagination. In murky waters or inaccessible places, we ignored their true nature and created legends. How can we decipher their underwater secrets?

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.desc: A drama packed mission flying six tigers from the Netherlands to South Africa is hardly off the ground before there’s a medical emergency; and the challenges of treating lions with medical problems.

programme.title: Wild Assassins
programme.desc: Cape Buffalos travel in herds and are fiercely protective of their young, they kill more humans in the wild than Lions or Tigers, fending off predators with their powerful horns.

programme.title: The Trouble With Wolves
programme.desc: Death threats, court battles, and an iconic endangered species in middle; The Trouble With Wolves takes an up-close look at the most heated and controversial wildlife conservation debate of our time.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy shows us how hunting was done in the mid-1800s by the Mountain Men, where unusual skills and stalking techniques were needed to survive throughout the winter. Harsh Winters were known as "White Death" to the Mountain Men.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains of Colorado. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge elk.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew catch sea turtles off the coast of Australia!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote goes on a frozen adventure in the wilderness and discovers ancient cave paintings while exploring in South Africa!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote shows us how saving turtles can be a hobby if done the right way!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote comes across a swamp creature that at first glance appears to be an eel...but it walks?!

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Friends are confronted by a grizzly and a woman ends up in a hippo's jaws.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A man comes face-to-face with a mother grizzly bear in Canada.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys must teach the Mississippi crew gator wrestling.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys do their best to tackle nuisance gators.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys must rebuild or be forced to turn away gators.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: On a compound in Florida, one man is killed and another fights for his life when a tiger breaks free and attacks. In Kansas, a young and innocent girl lies broken and dead when her dream photo shoot with a tiger goes badly wrong.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: A leading snake scientist lies dying in a remote jungle, bitten by the creature he set out to find. In North Carolina, a snake obsessive risks death for the 7th time at the fangs of his deadly 6-foot bushmaster.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Jungle Swamp
programme.desc: Bear Grylls goes into the Pacific Ring of Fire as he takes on a week of challenges in an area devastated by the 2004 Tsunami. He is dropped into the Indian Ocean and has to survive a week of challenges on a deserted island with no running water.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Castaway
programme.desc: Bear Grylls spends a week showing how to survive the challenges of the Pacific Ring of Fire. He is dropped into petrified swamps devastated by the 2004 Tsunami and has to navigate his way out.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Bear Eats
programme.desc: In this special film, Bear Grylls takes us to nature's kitchen. It seems nothing--except maybe the fat on a camel's hump--is beyond Bear Grylls.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Baja Desert
programme.desc: Bear Grylls is in Baja, Mexico. He tackles overwhelming odds to survive the challenges of the desert. The biggest threat to his survival comes from a bee sting that swells his eyes closed. Half blinded he battles a deadly diamond-back rattlesnake.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Something's Brewing
programme.desc: After losing her job and boyfriend on the same day, Jane Peterson vows to leave the city for good. Before she can, a handsome and charming barista helps her rediscover the city.

programme.desc: A consultant sent to acquire a local brewery falls for its crafty owner, then fights to save it from corporate takeover.

programme.title: The First Noelle
programme.desc: After an on-and-off relationship, Noelle and Terrance reunite during the holidays, but Noelle is surprised when Terrance returns home with a new girlfriend of the same name.

programme.title: Snowmance
programme.desc: Mary's favorite Christmas tradition is building a \"Snow Beau\" with her best friend Nick. After a breakup, Mary wonders if she'll ever find true love. When her Snow Beau comes to life, Mary has a choice between dream romance and reality.

programme.desc: The spoof that started it all. Scream with the Wayans brothers, Carmen Electra, Shannon Elizabeth, and Anna Faris as they bumble and shriek their way to horror-movie hilarity in Scary Movie.

programme.title: Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back
programme.desc: The comic "Bluntman and Chronic" is adapted for the big-screen by Hollywood without the permission of the real-life stoner icons of CLERKS— Jay and Silent Bob.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: Arguably the most outrageous Christmas tale ever told, Billy Bob Thornton is a thieving Santa who doesn't care if you've been naughty or nice. Hot on his trail: a security guard, a sexy bartender, and the one kid who's convinced he's the real deal.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Stoke (Billy Bob Thornton) returns as "Santa," this time in an effort to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. It's a hysterical sequel just outrageous enough to outdo the original.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ribald, tasteless and hilarious ... this classic spoof of the Western genre by director Mel Brooks pokes fun at everyone and everything.

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: An eccentric dad dresses as a British nanny so he can care for his kids at the home of their mother.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The second model is eliminated after extreme runway and sexy photo shoot competitions.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The All Star queens reunite to dish about the most shocking, glamorous and sickening moments of the season. Hosted by the Emmy Award winning RuPaul.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: Twelve All Stars arrive to compete for $100,000 and a chance to become the first inductee into RuPaul's Drag Race Hall of Fame. In the season premiere, the queens have to produce high fashion editorial photo spreads.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens find themselves battling for laughs while impersonating their favorite celebrities on "RuPaul's Gaff-In" with Vicki Lawrence's "Mama", who is joined on the judge's panel by actress Busy Phillips.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Genghis Khan, Asia's cold-blooded world conqueror, and Hannibal, the brutal annihilator of the Roman Empire, face off to the death in a battle between two warriors who wrote the book on ancient combat.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: The skull-busting war clubs of legendary Chief Crazy Horse take on the blazing rifles of Mexico's revolutionary hero Pancho Villa in this warrior match-up.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: This season of Alone features a brand new challenge as seven pairs of family members are dropped miles apart on Northern Vancouver Island, where they must find each other and survive together.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten survivalists from previous seasons return for redemption and a second chance to win the $500,000 prize. This time, they face the dangers of Northern Mongolia, a location more remote than they've ever seen.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The wheels start turning when four bladesmiths must forge friction folders from a rusty pickup truck. The salvaged steel proves temperamental, causing a few of the blades and smiths to crack under the pressure.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths take a stab at history when they are tasked with recreating an iconic fighting knife from the 20th century: the Fairbairn Sykes. However, replicating the blade is only half the challenge.

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Escape Room

programme.title: Hex

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.
